Document:
# Organ Manipulation
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Surgery"]
Organ manipulation surgeries allow you to remove, transplant, or replace internal organs. Replacing a damaged or missing organ can resolve conditions that no amount of surface treatment will fix.
## Standard Anatomy
A typical human body contains the following organs:
[bold]Brain[/bold]
[bold]Eyes[/bold]
[bold]Heart[/bold]
[bold]Kidneys[/bold]
[bold]Liver[/bold]
[bold]Lungs[/bold]
[bold]Stomach[/bold]
Some species have additional or combined organs. The above list covers the standard human baseline.
## Removing and Transplanting Organs
To [bold]remove[/bold] an organ, apply the corresponding Organ Removal surgery to the target body part. The organ will be extracted without harming the patient.
To [bold]transplant[/bold] a replacement organ, apply the corresponding Organ Transplant surgery to the same site where the original organ was located.
## Transplant Effects
Transplanting a [color=#a4885c]brain[/color] — transfers the patient's consciousness to a new body.
Transplanting a [color=#a4885c]liver[/color] — cures severe poisoning.
Transplanting [color=#a4885c]lungs[/color] — treats severe asphyxiation.
Transplanting a [color=#a4885c]heart[/color] — cures rot and organ decay.
Transplanting [color=#a4885c]eyes[/color] — restores vision and heals eye damage.
## Sourcing Organs
When a patient needs a replacement organ, their original is usually missing or too damaged to reuse. New organs can be manufactured using a [bold]Medical Biofabricator[/bold] with [bold]Biomass[/bold]. The biofabricator can produce biosynthetic organs for all species.
Every Chief Medical Officer has access to a Medical Biofabricator board in their starting equipment.
## Organ Rejection
If an organ transplant has no effect, the patient's body has rejected it. This usually means the organ is in poor condition. Use a fresh organ from a donor or manufacture a new one using the Medical Biofabricator.
